personas.name: Patient
personas.short_description: Manages medical records, views care timeline/graph, schedules appointments, receives explanations, monitors record access.
key_responsibilities: Upload and extract structured data from medical documents
Visualize patient history as an interactive knowledge graph
Detect duplicate medications, drug interactions, and missed follow-ups
Trace every AI-extracted fact to its source document
Grant time-limited doctor access via OTP with full audit logging
Provide multilingual plain-language explanations of prescriptions

personas.name: Doctor
personas.short_description: Accesses verified patient history summaries via OTP, reviews source-traced facts before consultations.
key_responsibilities: Grant time-limited doctor access via OTP with full audit logging
Generate AI-powered clinical summaries for doctors with source verification
Trace every AI-extracted fact to its source document
Visualize patient history as an interactive knowledge graph
Recommend appropriate specialists based on symptoms and history

personas.name: Hospital Administrator
personas.short_description: Monitors anonymized operational metrics, compliance, bottlenecks, and treatment timelines across patient cohorts.
key_responsibilities: Display hospital-level analytics on compliance, bottlenecks, and treatment timelines
Detect duplicate medications, drug interactions, and missed follow-up appointments
Trace every AI-extracted fact to its source document
Grant time-limited doctor access via OTP with full audit logging
